text:
8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 

VALUES: Dollar amount with two decimal places (e.g., 98.76); may be negative. 

COMMENT: Outlier payments compensate hospitals paid on a fixed amount per "diagnosis related group" 
discharge with extra dollars for patient stays that substantially exceed the typical requirements for 
patient stays in the same DRG category.
